creator: egypcio@FreeBSD.org
text:
hello there,

I would recommend trying to open a different PR which would be related to `/usr/sbin/daemon` or directly related to the use of jails for you.

why am I recommending that? because this particular port works just fine as is inside jails - and I am not the only one using it like that. to proof that, we not only build and run it inside jails but also start the daemon itself; can be reproduced by using `poudriere` bulk with -I, if you want to give it a try.

did you also check all relevant parameters used to configure/run your (bastille) jail? also a nice consideration to raise.

just to make it clear:

  1). the "-c" [use '/' as rootdir; even setting jail's rootdir, it wont' work because the process will be running on the main base system, depending on your setup];
  2). -f [i/o redirect] parameters you mentioned are parameters used by `/usr/sbin/daemon` and not the `dnscrypt-proxy` binary.
